verification: Mobile 390x844 smoke: only one data-mobile-pane is displayed at a time.
Mobile tab switching verified Timer, Routines, Progress, and Awards each show exactly one active pane.
Mobile bottom tabs are 52px touch targets and use aria-current on the active tab.
Timer action bar sits above the mobile tab bar at bottom 76px.
No horizontal overflow and no browser console errors during mobile tab switching.
Desktop 1280x900 smoke: all panes remain visible, mobile tab bar is hidden, and no horizontal overflow occurs.
result: Mobile flow no longer relies on scrolling one long page; it behaves like a focused four-view app shell while preserving desktop full-page layout.
